title: Update Available
message: A new version of ANUBIS APP LIBRARY is available.
changelog: Added Player Required support for compatible apps.
إضافة دعم Player Required للتطبيقات المتوافقة.
Added Downloader Code display for supported apps.
إضافة عرض كود Downloader للتطبيقات المدعومة.
General bug fixes and stability improvements.
